steps.title: Identify the outcome signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the population increase from roughly 100 to 1,300 birds—a direct result of the tree-planting strategy designed to boost numbers.

steps.title: Match the word to the outcome
steps.content: ”Successful” fits because the approach achieved its goal: boosting the bullfinch population from roughly 100 to 1,300 birds. The others contradict the outcome, lack support, or miss the point about effectiveness. That matches choice A — A is correct.
